header.headline: IR Kernel Registry Chain
header.subtitle: The registry chain connects high-level intent to concrete kernel implementations and their callable metadata.

intent.title: IR Intent
intent.body: Operations arrive with semantic intent, data type, and shape requirements.

registry.title: Registry Match
registry.body: Lookup resolves those requirements against known kernel families and variants.

binding.title: Kernel Binding
binding.body: Resolved kernels receive concrete argument bindings and runtime-facing metadata.

runtime.title: Runtime Call
runtime.body: The runtime invokes one selected implementation with explicit dispatch context.

outcome.title: Traceable Dispatch
outcome.body: The chain works when each dispatch step remains inspectable end to end.

footer.note: Registry-chain assets should teach how intent becomes runnable code, not just that a registry exists.
